title: Bitcoin VC Veterans Launch $40 Million Holding Company Targeting Small Business Acquisitions
summary: Bitcoin VC veterans, including Lyn Alden, have launched a $40 million permanent capital company to acquire profitable small businesses and transition them to a Bitcoin standard.
body:
A group of seasoned Bitcoin venture capitalists has unveiled a $40 million permanent capital company focused on acquiring profitable small businesses. The goal is to transition these businesses to a Bitcoin standard, leveraging the cryptocurrency for treasury reserves and financial operations.

Lyn Alden, a prominent Bitcoin analyst and macro strategist, is among the key figures helping to debut this initiative. The company will target businesses that are already profitable and have the potential to benefit from adopting Bitcoin as a treasury asset. This move is part of a broader strategy to integrate Bitcoin into mainstream business operations, providing an alternative to traditional fiat-based financial management.

For small business owners, this could mean increased financial stability and protection against currency debasement. By adopting a Bitcoin standard, businesses can reduce reliance on traditional banking systems and benefit from a sound money policy. This initiative could also attract more investors to the Bitcoin ecosystem, further solidifying its role in the global economy.

The holding company plans to announce its first acquisitions in the coming months. Business owners interested in this opportunity should watch for updates and consider how Bitcoin integration could benefit their operations. Read more → https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/bitcoin-vcs-launch-holding-company
twitterThread: Bitcoin VC veterans just launched a $40M permanent capital company to buy profitable small businesses and put them on a Bitcoin standard. Lyn Alden is helping debut the initiative.
The goal? Acquire profitable small businesses and integrate Bitcoin into their treasury operations. This could mean greater financial stability and protection against inflation for business owners.

If you're a small business owner, keep an eye out for their first acquisitions. Could this be a game-changer for your operations? Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-19-bitcoin-vc-veterans-launch-40m-holding-company-for-small-business-acquisitions
